title: chorizanthe brevicornu var. spathulata
intro: Chorizanthe brevicornu var. spathulata, a variant of the Chorizanthe brevicornu plant, is a flowering plant in the Amaranthaceae family, commonly found in the western United States. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Chorizanthe brevicornu var. spathulata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable resource for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
